title: $266k YTD Profit: My 3-Step Quantitative Strategy for Tracking Insider Alpha
author: Swimming-Salary9550
selftext:
I’ve automated my trading workflow to eliminate emotion. Currently up 3.8% YTD (with a $731k balance) by following a strict data-driven pipeline. Here is the breakdown:  
  
The "Smart Money" Filter I use an AI agent to scrape SEC Form 4s for Open Market Purchases. Criteria: Small caps (<$500M), executive buys exceeding 10% of their salary, and "Clusters" (2+ insiders buying within 7 days).  


The Solvency Gate (Survival Check) Insider buying is useless if the company goes bankrupt. I run every ticker through an Altman Z-Score stress test. Rule: If Z-Score < 1.81 or debt maturity is too aggressive, it’s an automatic REJECT.  
  
The Conviction Scoring (0-100) I rank survivors based on: Contrarian Sentiment: I look for stocks analysts hate but insiders are buying. Price Context: Buying within 10% of 52-week lows.

Current Top Picks: SDHC (Score: 90/100): Perfect cluster buy + Z-Score of 3.44 + Zero analyst buy ratings. CHUC (Score: 87/100): CEO/CFO buying simultaneously at $0.20/share.

Strategy: Score >70 = Full Position (2% risk). Score 50-69 = Half Position.

Stop chasing hype. Build a system, trust the math. 🥂
